Table DCS_DEVICERETURN

Card of table DCS_DEVICERETURN

Name

DCS_DEVICERETURN

Code

DCS_DEVICERETURN

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_DEVICERETURN

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_INTERACTION" schema

called "DCS_DEVICERETURN".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_DEVICERETURN_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ID, MARKET_CODE,VALID_FROM))

 

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

9.Use "__WRITE_TS" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO)

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_DEVICERETURN

CKT_DCS_DEVICERETURN


Server validation rule of the table DCS_DEVICERETURN

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_DEVICERETURN

drop table DCS_DEVICERETURN cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_DEVICERETURN
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN (
DCS_DEVICERETURN_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DEVICE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY TEXT not null,
ID TEXT not null,
RETURNEDDEVICEID TEXT,
RETURNEDCODENTIFYID TEXT,
RETURNEDCOMPONENTID TEXT,
RETURNEDCOMPONENTCODE TEXT,
RETURNEDCOMPONENTDESCRIPTION TEXT,
NEWDEVICEID TEXT,
NEWCODENTIFYID TEXT,
NEWCOMPONENTID TEXT,
NEWCOMPONENTCODE TEXT,
NEWCOMPONENTDESCRIPTION TEXT,
RETURNREASON TEXT,
RECEIPTNUMBER TEXT,
RETURNEDDATE DATE,
OWNERID TEXT,
RETAILERID TEXT,
TOUCHPOINTID TEXT,
CALLCENTERID TEXT,
RELATEDDIAGNOSTICID TEXT,
STAFFID TEXT,
SESSIONID TEXT,
DONEBY TEXT,
REGISTEREDSYSTEM DATE,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_DEVICERETURN primary key (DCS_DEVICERETURN_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.DCS_DEVICERETURN_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.DCS_DEVICE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.ID is
'Business Key. Device identifier (guid). ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.RETAILERID is
'DCS user unique identifier that placed the order - Backend user (when order is placed through retailer)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.TOUCHPOINTID is
'ID of the touchpoint (POS) assigned to the activity';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.CALLCENTERID is
'DCS user unique identifier (if device registered by call center agent)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.STAFFID is
'ID of the staff assigned to the activity on the device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.SESSIONID is
'ID of the session assigned to the activity on the device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.REGISTEREDSYSTEM is
'Date time (UTC) from a timestamp in milliseconds, when device was created (package date time)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN
add constraint FK_DCS_DEVI_R27_DEVIC_DCS_DEVI foreign key (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICE (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICERETURN
add constraint FK_DCS_DEVI_R32_DEVIC_DCS_DEVI foreign key (DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICE (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
